message:
bd-3r75: add 43 unit tests for permissions, theme, model_selector

Coverage improvements for three more modules:
- permissions.rs: 11 new tests (13→24) covering days_to_ymd date math,
  expired/non-expired lookup, to_cache_map filtering, serde roundtrip
- theme.rs: 20 new tests (17→37) covering validate_color, resolve with
  empty/None config, case-insensitive builtins, glob_json, discover_themes,
  load_by_name, tui_styles/glamour_style_config smoke tests
- model_selector.rs: 12 new tests (14→26) covering fuzzy_match,
  matches_query, ModelKey::full_id, scroll_offset, edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
